name: ESIA certificate
notes: Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
definition: Environmental and Social Impact Assessment certificate issued by EMA, required before implementing projects in EMA-listed categories.

name: eGP
notes: Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
definition: Zimbabwe's electronic government procurement portal operated under PRAZ, used for public tender submission.

name: PRAZ bidder registration
notes: Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
definition: Annual registration of suppliers, bidders and contractors for public-procurement eligibility, valid to 31 December.

name: BOQ (bill of quantities)
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: An itemised schedule of measured work used to price and control a construction contract.

name: Payment certificate
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: The certified valuation of work done that authorises a progress payment under the contract.

name: Retention
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: A percentage withheld from each certificate, released after the defects liability period.

name: Practical completion
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: The contract milestone when works are complete enough for the employer to take possession.

name: Defects liability period
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: The period after practical completion during which the contractor must remedy defects.

name: Variation order
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: An instructed change to contracted work adjusting scope, price or programme.

name: WIP (work in progress)
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Cost of work performed that has not yet been certified or billed.

name: Bid and performance security
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Guarantees supporting a bid or contract performance, commonly required in public works.

name: Site instruction
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: A written instruction issued on site that may lead to a variation or cost record.
